testCases.testName: Enter 'Add an email field for contact email', verify field created with type='text', validationPattern includes '@'
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) Natural language input dialog opens, (2) Command 'Add an email field for contact email' is accepted, (3) Email field is created in form, (4) Field has validationPattern with '@' symbol. Implementation files: src/components/workspace/FormViewer.tsx

testCases.testName: Verify generated SHACL shape has sh:path='schema:email' and sh:pattern for email validation
testCases.notes: API test executed successfully. Verified: (1) POST /api/admin/modify-form endpoint works, (2) SHACL shape includes PropertyShape with sh:path='schema:email', (3) sh:pattern matches email regex '^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$', (4) sh:message is appropriate, (5) semanticType='schema:email'

testCases.testName: Enter 'Add a phone number field', verify field has sh:pattern for phone validation
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) Phone field creation via natural language, (2) semanticType='schema:telephone', (3) validationPattern matches phone regex, (4) sh:message for phone validation error. Implementation files: src/components/workspace/FormViewer.tsx, backend/services/shacl_generator.py

testCases.testName: Enter 'Add a name field for applicant full name', verify field has alphanumeric-only validation pattern
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) Name field creation, (2) semanticType='schema:name', (3) validationPattern='^[a-zA-ZÀ-ÿ\s'-]+$', (4) sh:message for name validation. Implementation files: backend/schemas/validation_patterns.py (NAME_PATTERN)

testCases.testName: Click 'View SHACL' icon, verify dialog displays complete JSON-LD SHACL shape for all form fields
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) 'View SHACL' button exists in form header, (2) Dialog opens with SHACL shape visualization, (3) JSON-LD format is displayed with syntax highlighting, (4) All form fields are represented in sh:property array. Implementation files: src/components/workspace/FormViewer.tsx (SHACL dialog component)

testCases.testName: Modify form by adding a field, verify SHACL shape updates automatically in real-time
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) SHACL shape before modification, (2) Add a new field via natural language, (3) SHACL shape after modification includes new field, (4) Real-time update without page refresh. Implementation files: src/components/workspace/FormViewer.tsx (state management for SHACL shape)

testCases.testName: Enter invalid email 'testexample.com' in email field, verify validation error displayed inline
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) Client-side SHACL validation on blur, (2) Invalid email triggers validation error, (3) Error message displayed inline below field, (4) Field highlighted with error styling (red border). Implementation files: src/components/workspace/FormViewer.tsx (validateFieldWithSHACL function)

testCases.testName: Enter name with numbers 'John123', verify validation error 'Name must contain only letters'
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) Name field validation rejects numbers, (2) Error message: 'Name must contain only letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes', (3) Field highlighted with error styling. Implementation files: backend/schemas/validation_patterns.py (NAME_PATTERN), src/components/workspace/FormViewer.tsx

testCases.testName: Enter 'Remove the phone number field', verify field removed and SHACL shape updated
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) Remove field via natural language command, (2) Field removed from form display, (3) SHACL shape no longer contains removed field PropertyShape, (4) POST request to /api/admin/modify-form with remove operation. Implementation files: backend/services/shacl_generator.py (remove action handler)

testCases.testName: Enter ambiguous command 'Add a field', verify clarification request from AI
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) Ambiguous command triggers clarification request, (2) Dialog or message displays clarification question, (3) No field added until clarification provided, (4) User can provide clarification and retry. Implementation files: backend/services/shacl_generator.py (parse_nl_command with action='clarify')

testCases.testName: Copy SHACL shape to clipboard, verify valid JSON-LD format
testCases.errorMessage: Manual test - Requires Playwright MCP for UI automation
testCases.notes: UI test requiring Playwright automation. Test should verify: (1) 'Copy to clipboard' button in SHACL dialog, (2) Clipboard contains valid JSON after click, (3) JSON-LD format with @context, @type, sh:property, (4) Success message displayed. Implementation files: src/components/workspace/FormViewer.tsx (copy to clipboard handler)

testCases.testName: Add date field, verify sh:datatype='xsd:date' and sh:pattern for ISO date format
testCases.notes: API test executed successfully. Verified: (1) Date field creation via natural language, (2) semanticType='schema:birthDate', (3) sh:datatype='xsd:date', (4) sh:pattern matches ISO date format '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$', (5) field type='date'. Implementation files: backend/services/shacl_generator.py, backend/models/shacl_property_shape.py

bugFixesApplied.issue: ValidationPattern TypedDict accessed with attribute syntax instead of dictionary syntax
bugFixesApplied.fix: Changed validation_pattern.pattern to validation_pattern['pattern'] and validation_pattern.message to validation_pattern['message']

recommendations.title: Set up Playwright MCP for UI test automation
recommendations.description: 10 out of 12 tests require Playwright for UI automation. Setting up Playwright MCP would enable complete automated test coverage for S5-001.

recommendations.title: Add API tests for phone and name field types
recommendations.description: While TC-S5-001-02 and TC-S5-001-12 cover email and date fields, adding similar API tests for phone and name fields would increase backend API coverage.

recommendations.title: Add unit tests for schema_org_mappings.py
recommendations.description: The schema.org mapping logic is critical for semantic type inference. Unit tests would ensure correct mappings for all supported field types.

recommendations.title: Create test fixtures for common form scenarios
recommendations.description: Reusable test fixtures for forms with multiple fields would simplify future test development and ensure consistency.
